messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "63e832d4-4359-46c3-9ea7-4d7f1bdf5ae2", "article_id": "5d34d63f-cd4f-4179-b0b1-66761e143a8e", "source_name": "Vogue Fashion", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "brand_mention", "brand": "Orebella", "person": "Bella Hadid", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["the model and Orebella mogul", "In a recent Instagram snap offering a glimpse inside the Orebella boardroom"], "anchor_json": {"brand_category": "beauty/founder-owned", "mention_type": "business context", "brand": "Orebella", "person": "Bella Hadid"}}, {"event_frame_id": "a42574e9-a536-42ac-8315-13a852d780b4", "article_id": "fb6c6295-48ec-40f0-990c-d1cf49e036ce", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_style_appearance", "brand": "", "person": "Bella Hadid", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["In the photos, Hadid is seen sitting at a chair in a cedar brown trench, which she belted over a pinstripe dress shirt. Yet, the tiniest, but perhaps most striking detail of the look is the model's thin brown acetate headband, which she uses to hold her wavy hair back", "Final sample meeting before production and as you can tell … I'm a Libra to a T and this girl needs …options!"], "anchor_json": {"trend_reference": "skinny headband vs Carolyn Bessette Kennedy's thick tortoiseshell headbands", "stylistic_note": "'90s-inspired minimalist approach replacing previous Westernwear", "person": "Bella Hadid"}}, {"event_frame_id": "e3899995-65e2-4c2e-acb7-f788082fedf5", "article_id": "5d34d63f-cd4f-4179-b0b1-66761e143a8e", "source_name": "Vogue Fashion", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_style_adoption", "brand": "", "person": "Bella Hadid", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Bella Hadid has hung up her cowboy hat for the time being, swapping it for a Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy-coded headband", "Hadid has hung up her horse-girl headgear for a very Carolyn Bessette Kennedy-inspired accessory"], "anchor_json": {"style_reference": "Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy (CBK)", "trend_context": "'90s minimalist revival", "media_trigger": "FX/ Ryan Murphy influence", "person": "Bella Hadid"}}]}
